title: dactylorhiza longifolia
intro: Dactylorhiza longifolia, also known as the autumn ladies' tresses, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza longifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Dactylorhiza longifolia is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases.
